svg.title: Vigil system architecture
svg.desc: Two-tier voice copilot architecture: device mic feeds LiveKit STT, Python agent detects wake word, normalizes drug aliases, routes to Tier 1 deterministic Moss lookup or Tier 2 LLM-grounded synthesis, builds response, speaks via Minimax TTS, sends glance card back to device.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does LiveKit Inference STT work in Vigil?')
sendPrompt('How does Vigil wake-word detection work?')
sendPrompt('How does Vigil alias normalization work?')
sendPrompt('How does the Vigil tier router classify queries?')
sendPrompt('How does Vigil Tier 1 deterministic lookup work?')
sendPrompt('How does Vigil Tier 2 hybrid retrieval work?')
sendPrompt('How is the Minimax LLM constrained in Vigil Tier 2?')
sendPrompt('How does Vigil build spoken_form and card JSON?')
sendPrompt('How does Vigil use Minimax TTS for dose pronunciation safety?')
sendPrompt('What constraints does Vigil place on the Minimax LLM call?')
sendPrompt('How does Vigil handle TTS pronunciation safety?')
